articles.author: Brooke Nally for KSL
articles.title: 2 Utah companies are quietly changing how AI actually works for real businesses - KSL.com
articles.description: While lawmakers debate what AI should do, a Park City MarTech firm and a Utah hotel agency are already showing what it can do — and the results are hard to argue with.
articles.content: PARK CITY Most conversations about AI in Utah right now are happening at the policy level what rules should govern it, what risks need to be managed, what bills need to pass. While those are importan… [+6044 chars]

articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai, Zack Whittaker
articles.title: Someone has publicly leaked an exploit kit that can hack millions of iPhones - TechCrunch
articles.description: Leaked "DarkSword" exploits published to GitHub allow hackers and cybercriminals to target iPhone users running old versions of iOS with spyware, according to cybersecurity researchers.
articles.content: Last week, cybersecurity researchers uncovered a hacking campaign targeting iPhone users that used an advanced hacking tool called DarkSword. Now someone has leaked a newer version of DarkSword and p… [+4620 chars]
